violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface Reach-in-coolers were not cleaned as frequently as required.--Nonfood contact surface Reach-in-Freezer was not cleaned as frequently as required.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not maintained in good repair. Several floor tiles missing or damaged repair to working order.
General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Kitchen staff observed changing tasks without washing hands.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Onions in mesh style bag stored on floor outside kitchen entrance.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Sauces, meats, and other items in refrigerator not date marked from previous day.

Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. Front prep area/tortilla station does not have a hood over propane flat top.
Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. 3 Compartment sink faucet has constant leak.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. No hand washing lavatory accessible to front prep/tortilla area.--Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. Kitchen handwash sink filled with dirty dishes.
